calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

Petitioner Jared Wayne Ryan present in court.
Petitioner Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication and Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Gender from male to female.
Decree Changing Name and Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate were signed by the Court.
